intro: FiveOS stands on the shoulders of these third-party projects and services. Click any link to visit the source.

items.name: CodeWalker
items.description: RAGE resource library — reads/writes .ydr, .ytd, .ymap, .ybn. The binary writer that makes FiveOS's converter possible.

items.name: Sketchfab
items.description: Source for File → Import from Sketchfab URL. Requires a personal API token.

items.name: Meshy AI
items.description: Image → 3D generation on the Mesh Optimize tab.

items.name: Rockstar Games / Take-Two Interactive
items.description: GTA V freemode reference meshes used in Emotes for pose scale and retargeting. Grand Theft Auto and related marks are property of Take-Two Interactive / Rockstar Games. Not affiliated with Rockstar or Take-Two.

items.name: Modly
items.description: Reference for the Mesh Optimize tab's decimate / remesh pipeline.
